allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('supabase/bibliotheque_communautaire.sql'\); Write-Output \("File size: {0} bytes" -f $bytes.Length\); Write-Output \("First 10 bytes: {0}" -f \(\($bytes[0..9] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)\); $hasNonAscii = $false; foreach \($b in $bytes\) { if \($b -gt 127\) { $hasNonAscii = $true; break } }; Write-Output \("Contains non-ASCII bytes: $hasNonAscii"\))

PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('supabase/bibliotheque_communautaire.sql'\); $content = $content.TrimStart\([char]0xFEFF\); $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Resolve-Path 'supabase/bibliotheque_communautaire.sql'\).Path, $content, $utf8NoBom\); $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('supabase/bibliotheque_communautaire.sql'\); Write-Output \("First 5 bytes: {0}" -f \(\($bytes[0..4] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)\); Write-Output \("File size: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes"\))
